name: Apple Praline Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Granny Smith apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bottom crust and place it in a baking dish.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
3. Combine the filling ingredients: apples, sugar, flour, cinnamon, salt, and butter. Pour into the pie shell.
4. Dot the top of the filling with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
5. Place the top crust over the pie and seal and flute the edges.
6. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and set aside, leaving the oven on.
8. Cover the exposed edges with foil to prevent overbrowning.
9. Remove the foil if used.
10. In a small saucepan, blend the topping ingredients: butter, brown sugar, half-and-half, and pecans. Warm gently.
11. Pour the warm topping mixture over the pie.
12. Place on a cookie sheet and bake for an additional 3-4 minutes or until the top bubbles.
13. Allow to cool for 2 hours before serving.
